title: Creative Flight Speed
body:
**Increase your creative flight speed beyond vanilla limit using customizable keybinds!**

### ✨ Features
- Adjustable Speed: Increase or decrease your creative flight speed on the fly.
- High Limits: Boost your speed up to 40x standard flight.
- Fully Configurable: All keybinds can be changed in the controls menu.

### ⌨️ Controls (Default)
- [O] Increase Speed
- [U] Decrease Speed
- [I] Reset to Default Speed

### ⚠️ Compatibility
- CameraOverhaul: Currently incompatible (good luck controlling your camera).

### 📝 Notes
- I created this because I needed it for myself specifically for Forge 1.20.1 and couldn't find anything other than Fabric/old versions, therefore I will most likely not be updating/porting this mod to other versions unless I need them personally.
